nasb.text: for it is not the hearers of the Law who are just before God, but the doers of the Law will be justified.

esv.text: For it is not the hearers of the law who are righteous before God, but the doers of the law who will be justified.

cnv.text: 因為在　神面前，不是聽律法的為義，而是行律法的得稱為義。

ccb.text: 因为上帝眼中的义人不是听到律法的人，而是遵行律法的人。

csbs.text: 因为在神面前，不是律法的听者为义，而是律法的实行者被称为义。
